title: Golf Umbrella Windproof Large 62/68 Inch, Double Canopy Vented, Automatic Open, Extra Large Oversized,Sun Protection Ultra Rain & Wind Resistant Stick Umbrellas
features: 62-INCH LARGE UMBRELLA: With a 62 inch oversize canopy, sleek all black design, comfortable EVA grip, sturdy frame, it can protect you from strong wind, heavy downpour or under the sun.It's big enough for two persons when opened.
AUTOMATIC OPEN: Automatic Open functionality ensures that there will be no delay to your comfort. Simply press the button on the handle to open in less than a second with single hand.

LIGHTWEIGHT & HIGH QUALITY MATERIALS: We use high quality fiberglass for the tips and ribs, which is strong and flexible whilst not being so heavy that you hand fatigues.The canopy uses ultra water resistant 210T pongee micro-weave fabric. This silk derived material is lightweight, quick drying.

DOUBLE CANOPY CONSTRUCTION: The double-canopy design and hardened steel frame will ensure that your umbrella is virtually windproof. The durable construction creates a vent during where wind can pass through, making the umbrella much easier to handle in harsh conditions.

LIFETIME REPLACEMENT GUARANTEE: You are protected from the rain, strong breeze, sleet and snow using our umbrella. The Umbrella(s) That You Purchase will be Automatically Enrolled in our lifetime replacement guarantee program. If anything at all goes wrong with your umbrella, we will send you a replacement absolutely free, no return required.Please feel free to contact us, we are always here to help.
description: Product Description Our largest umbrella for maximum coverage. Be prepared for the inclement weather to hit at any moment when you use the ACEIken 58'/62”/68" Umbrella. The double canopy design holds up against strong winds and the 100% water repellent 190T fabric keeps the rain from dripping through. The simple all-over black  with the ACEIken branding adds a classic look to your golfing years. The ACEIken Golf Umbrella is not only for golfers! It makes an ideal choice if you are looking for maximum coverage in any storm. Difference colors and sizes choice for you The ACEIken Golf Umbrella is our largest long-shafted umbrella, featuring a massive 58/62/68-inch arc diameter canopy. It can cover 2 adults easily. 1 .You won't get wet anymore. 2. Offer enough cover for you and your golf gears when you go out play golf. 3.Difference colors and size choice for you fits any occasion easily. Detail High Lights Design for Storm Day The Golf's exclusive "Duplex Frame" dual-canopy design navigates wind through its vented construction.It allows wind to pass through the top without fear of inversion during sudden gusts. This umbrella is built to last through heavy rain and wind, finished with an attractive metal end cap that provides a non-slip grip option during wet conditions. The fabric used to construct the umbrella is of the highest quality, and it is 100% waterproof, allowing you to continue your round when the rain comes down. Strong bulit frame S turdy built frame makes sure it can hang tough in high winds without blowing inside out. An extremely s trong fiberglass shaft gives the umbrella unsurpassed stability. Eight strong umbrella ribs make sure it can hold up strong wind. So it won't be lifted out of your hands. Quick Dry Made by high density 190T fabric , which will cause water in drops. Just simply shake it in times , this umbrella will dry much faster than other brands. Auto Open & Solf Handle Single Hand Operation Simply press the button on the handle to open the canopy. To return, manually pull with your hand until you can hear an audible click. S uper Soft Sponge Handle Design gives your comfortable feelings when you hold it & your hand won't feel cool in winter. T he new opening and closing system doesn't involve any pinching, so your fingers are safe. T he handle is 1-1/2" in diameter which fits most push cart adjustable umbrella holders perfectly 58" golf umbrella fits one people 22 OZ ,Lightweight 58" ACEIken Umbrella perfect for one people--Good enough to keep you and your stuff dry, you will never get wet ! 62" golf umbrella fits 2 people 25.3 OZ ,Large canopy 62" ACEIken Umbrella perfectly cover 2-3 people--Good enough to keep your family dry, you will never get wet ! 68" golf umbrella fits 3-4 people Extra Large canopy 68" ACEIken Umbrella perfectly cover 3-4 people.Perfect for family our door activities.
